issues.objection: 7.29 ships a concrete diagnostic an engineer could actually use. The concrete_scenario names specific tooling and a real role-shape; the falsifiability field forecloses the specific misreading hostile readers would supply. Quotable line: "Career-end substrate-knowledge written down is the engineering shadow; the verse's brahman-adhyātma-karma is the metaphy…" Counter-example carves out where the analog does NOT apply. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Heavily metaphysical and forward-pointing. Verse seeds Ch 8's adhyātma/brahman/karma typology. Engineering analog scoped at career-end substrate-articulability. Counter-example: tacit untransmitted gnosis is the failure mode of the analog.

notes: Hostile-engineer test for 7.29: would a senior reading this verse mock it as Sanskrit-flavoured productivity content? No. The verse names a discipline (or pathology) with operational specificity. PASS.
